allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps peer-review-your-perspectives widen the frame so the critique tests interdependencies rather than only local arguments.
allies.source_quote: diverse perspectives help reveal parts of the system one viewpoint misses

allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops turn peer review into an actual correction mechanism instead of a one-time opinion exchange.
allies.source_quote: good review creates an iterative loop of challenge and refinement

allies.rationale_text: Opportunity-cost strengthens peer-review-your-perspectives by forcing reviewers to test what alternative explanations or moves the current view may be crowding out.
allies.source_quote: other perspectives reveal what your current view may be causing you to miss

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias undermines peer review when the reviewer is recruited to reinforce the existing story instead of independently challenging it.
antagonists.source_quote: The point is to test your view, not to hear it echoed back.

antagonists.rationale_text: Authority-bias weakens peer-review-your-perspectives when status determines which critiques count and which viewpoints are never allowed to challenge the frame.
antagonists.source_quote: independent judgments matter more than deference to rank or prestige

structured_tensions.tension_text: Peer-review-your-perspectives conflicts with authority-bias when peer review defers to the highest-status reviewer rather than weighting evidence quality independently.
structured_tensions.source_quote: peer-review-your-perspectives conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when peer review defers to the highest-status reviewer rather than weighting evidence quality independently.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Peer-review-your-perspectives conflicts with confirmation-bias when reviewers selected from the same paradigm reinforce shared blind spots instead of challenging them.
structured_tensions.source_quote: peer-review-your-perspectives conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when reviewers selected from the same paradigm reinforce shared blind spots instead of challenging them.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on feedback-rich outside challenge and conflicts with echoing and deference, so the file preserves that first-order surface without forcing weaker tension structure.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the clearest critique, feedback, and anti-deference neighborhood.
open_questions: Incentives are source-real partner pressure, but the retained set favors the cleaner direct wording around opportunity-cost, feedback, and anti-authority drift.
